alkylation reagent: alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min
cleavage agent: diluted with 50 mM TEABC before Lys-C and trypsin digestion overnight
fragmentation method: the collision energy was automatically adjusted by the rolling CID function
instrument: A TripleTOF 5600 system (AB SCIEX) was equipped with a nanoACQUITY UPLC
ionization type: Data were acquired using an ion spray voltage of 2.6 kV
labeling: Label-free quantitative analysis was performed by IDEAL-Q software
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) for 30 min
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) for 30 min
